query:
SHOW COLUMNS FROM projects LIKE '%digest%';

-- Hot projects with no send_ready contact
SELECT priority, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
    WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
    WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_send_ready
FROM projects p
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY priority;

-- Hot projects with no send_ready contact
SELECT priority, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
    WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
    WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_send_ready
FROM projects p
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY priority;
